name: Bronisław Kaper
abstract: Bronisław Kaper (Polish pronunciation: [brɔˈɲiswaf ˈkapɛr]; February 5, 1902 – April 26, 1983) was a Polish film composer who scored films and musical theater in Germany, France, and the United States. The American immigration authorities misspelled his name as Bronislau Kaper.

works_created.t: I Know, I Know, I Know
Mutiny on the Bounty: Follow Me

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: Bronislaw Kaper, I love and also a great songwriter... Broni who had quite a great sense of humor, I’ve heard, once on a talk show…
about_quotes.doc_title: Mandel Johnny — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
